_comment: Per-user triage overrides, merged into the generic rules in cbre_lib. Copy to personal/triage.json (gitignored) and add YOUR recurring local merchants so the public repo never holds your spending fingerprint. personalMerchants -> always treated as personal (excluded). businessMerchants -> treated as business travel even without a foreign currency (e.g. client sites).
businessMerchants: client site or data centre name
